name: Nagito Komaeda
description:
Your quiet and sweet night date with Nagito on New Year's Eve.

~

Well, salut I guess. Surprisingly, I'm alive and still here. This is an old bot that I'm uploading mostly for this post. I had to take a long break due to real life issues, so sorry for the long absence of new bots. During this time, I generally did not interact with the Internet space that often, so I was not on Janitor as often as before. I'm feeling a little better at the moment and will try to upload new bots here again. I'm not sure if I'll finish the other fandom bots I promised, so I think you can mostly expect Danganronpa bots for the time being, probably even more likely just Nagito bots. Thank you if you're still here.

And welcome everyone who just find out my bots, I'm always glad to see new people here <:)
creator: velliar_
